source: This Old House: a professional AC tune-up runs $65–$200 (avg ~$133). DIY maintenance you can safely do yourself — a filter swap plus coil-cleaning supplies — typically runs $15–$50, per HomeGuide's AC coil-cleaning cost guide. Refrigerant work and internal coil service should stay with a licensed pro.
regionNote: U.S. typical; after-hours calls, refrigerant work, and peak-season pricing run higher.
